text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That was great, Trainer! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Having my rivals constantly on my mind
should help me work up a real sweat! I can feel
it—my solo training sessions are gonna burn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll pay you back on the track, so just you wait!
